narrative:
Turtlecreek Twp K (precinct in Warren County) has 634 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.1 percentage points.
